allow:
Bash(# Get metadata
curl -s "https://8qxi7g9f.us-east.insforge.app/api/metadata" \\
  -H "X-API-Key: ik_1d7dbba35789d433df6c5e03c634e4a7" 2>&1 | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Get anon key
curl -s "https://8qxi7g9f.us-east.insforge.app/api/metadata/api-key" \\
  -H "X-API-Key: ik_1d7dbba35789d433df6c5e03c634e4a7" 2>&1 | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# List existing tables
curl -s "https://8qxi7g9f.us-east.insforge.app/api/database/tables" \\
  -H "X-API-Key: ik_1d7dbba35789d433df6c5e03c634e4a7" 2>&1 | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Generate anon token for client-side usage
curl -s -X POST "https://8qxi7g9f.us-east.insforge.app/api/auth/tokens/anon" \\
  -H "X-API-Key: ik_1d7dbba35789d433df6c5e03c634e4a7" 2>&1 | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Test with Supabase \(default — no NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND set\)
curl -s "https://web3school-lime.vercel.app/api/test-insforge" | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Test with InsForge backend
curl -s "https://web3school-lime.vercel.app/api/test-insforge" | python -m json.tool 2>/dev/null)
